label: Officina Meccanica

beats.name: HOOK
beats.video_prompt: Close-up, Italian mechanic's hands covered in black grease, emerging from under a Fiat with open gearbox. Phone on workbench showing 13 missed calls. He looks at screen, wipes hands on blue rag. Calls back. Industrial garage interior, tools hanging, cars on lifts. Raw documentary feel, handheld, desaturated industrial tones, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: PROBLEM
beats.video_prompt: Close-up of handwritten phone log on paper, names and numbers scrawled in pen. Then: car inspection sticker expired 8 months ago, date circled in red. Hand flipping through pages. Harsh fluorescent garage lighting, gritty documentary feel, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Venti telefonate al giorno per un'officina di tre persone. Tredici sono 'a che punto e la mia auto?' Un'ora persa ogni giorno. A cinquanta euro l'ora, tredicimila euro l'anno di lavoro mai fatturato.

beats.name: AGITATION
beats.video_prompt: Phone ringing on greasy workbench, no one answering. Oil-stained hands visible in background working under a hood. Stark industrial light, high contrast, tense stillness, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

beats.name: SOLUTION
beats.video_prompt: Same Italian mechanic working under the hood, focused and calm. Phone on workbench shows WhatsApp notification: message sent to client about car ready. Through the glass door, a client arrives with keys in hand, smiling. No phone calls needed. Warm afternoon light, saturated warm tones, smooth tracking shot, hopeful, cinematic 4K, 9:16 vertical

voiceover.text: Con FLUXION, il WhatsApp parte da solo quando l'auto e pronta. Il promemoria revisione parte sessanta giorni prima della scadenza. Sara risponde al telefono mentre sei sotto al cofano. Zero abbonamenti. Zero commissioni.
FLUXION. Quattrocentonovantasette euro. Una volta. Per sempre.

lines.text: Il gestionale che non ti costa ogni mese

video_gen_config.negative_prompt: text overlay, watermarks, logos, brand names, blurry, distorted faces, low quality, overexposed, artifacts, generic stock footage, CGI, artificial
video_gen_config.style_prefix: Cinematic 4K, gritty documentary, authentic Italian garage, industrial realism

music_gen_config.genre_hint: industrial modern, synth bass with percussion, strong and reliable

prompts.tense: industrial tension, low synth bass drone, metallic percussion, dark atmosphere, minor key, 85bpm, no vocals
prompts.uplifting: modern industrial uplift, driving synth bass, confident percussion, powerful, major key, 110bpm, no vocals

wa_message:
Ciao [nome], quante telefonate prende la tua officina al giorno?
La meta sono 'e pronta la mia auto?'
Questo risolve quello. [VIDEO]

source_data.revisione: obbligatoria dopo 4 anni, poi ogni 2 [CdS art. 80]
